title: Fire 3 lane_dispatch workflow_dispatch + execute Lane_01 task full lifecycle
self_approve_authority: AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1 YES list (workflow firing + Lane_01 task execution wrapper is tech non-canon)
wraps_inner_task: LANE01-W3-QA-LOOP-WIRE-V1 (Lane_01 task pickup from workflow run step summary; full lifecycle executed in same session)

phases.name: Fire 3 workflow_dispatch
actions: gh workflow run lane_dispatch.yml -f lane_id=Lane_01 → run 25038947664
gh workflow run lane_dispatch.yml -f lane_id=Lane_02 → run 25038950207
gh workflow run lane_dispatch.yml -f lane_id=Lane_03 → run 25038951889

phases.name: Verify 3 runs SUCCESS + capture URLs
actions: Wait until all 3 runs complete; verify status=completed conclusion=success
Verify run logs contain expected NEXT_TASK_ID line for each Lane

phases.name: Pickup + execute Lane_01 task (full lifecycle)
actions: Run full task lifecycle: snapshot → 5 phases → standard validators → commit → push → mark-done queue

phases.name: Report
actions: Lane_01 task LANE01-W3-QA-LOOP-WIRE-V1 execution status reported
Lane_02 + Lane_03 task specs + run URLs surfaced for their respective executors to pickup

boundary_check.lane_dispatch_workflow_does_not_execute_: verified — only surfaces spec to step summary
